title: Parser adapter incremental migration
objective: Migrate parser behavior incrementally behind an adapter while preserving golden contracts.
description: Introduces the selected parser strategy without breaking existing invocations.
parallel_safe_reason: Parser migration touches central command dispatch.
must: Implement selected parser path behind an adapter.
Keep old behavior callable until parity is proven.
Migrate incrementally by command groups where possible.
acceptance: Package-installed smoke passes for both binaries.
No public command invocation is intentionally broken.
validation_hints: If adding dependency, use normal npm install and commit package-lock changes.
Keep parser errors localized or compatible with existing i18n behavior.
